name: CLX - MGA Insurance Review Triggered Event v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Triggered by behavioral_signals processing (BI pipeline) when a high-relevance signal lands on a lead with an in-force insurance policy. Maps signal_type → review_type + trigger_signal_type, creates policy_reviews row with priority=high + due_date=NOW+7d, fires B7.1 video generator immediately, notifies advisor.

parameters._note: We don't have direct lead_id->policy_applications mapping; instead query by client_id derived from lead. Doing two-step lookup via leads table next node.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; if (!row || !row.id) return JSON.stringify({ skip: true }); return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, policy_review_id: row.id }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Review').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; const b = $('Build Review Row').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'review_triggered_by_signal', client_id: b.client_id, advisor_id: b.advisor_id, policy_application_id: b.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { policy_review_id: row && row.id, trigger_signal_type: b.insert_row.trigger_signal_type, signal_id: b.insert_row.trigger_signal_id, priority: b.insert_row.priority }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Review').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_review_id: row && row.id, trigger_signal_type: $('Build Review Row').item.json.insert_row.trigger_signal_type }); })() }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, skipped: true, reason: $json.error || 'no_in_force_policy' }) }}
